title: FJ27cool's Guns
description: A mod that adds guns, grenades and bullets! Made with MCreator.
body:
A gun mod with new weapons, bullets and other features.


Adds:

a bullet

a pistol

a sniper

a minigun

a bulletmaker block

a bullettrader entity

the bullettrader`s house

a grenade and a grenade launcher

a rocket and a rocket launcher

a bomb

blood effects when entity is hurt

blood buckets and bottles

dead villager bodies

raw and cooked villager meat

recepies for all


It's fully made by me in MCreator and Blockbench.
